tagline: Santa Rosa's water heater and plumbing experts since 1982 — family-owned, licensed and trusted
seoDescription: Curoso Plumbing in Santa Rosa, CA: family-owned since 1982 for water heaters, repiping, drain cleaning and plumbing repair. Licensed #706012.
heroSubheading: Family-owned and operated by Jim Curoso. Licensed, bonded and insured plumbers specializing in water heaters, repiping, drain cleaning and everyday plumbing repair across the North Bay.
highlights: Water heater specialists — same-day service with 24-hour answering
aboutBody: Curoso Plumbing has served Santa Rosa and the North Bay since 1982. Owner Jim Curoso learned the trade from his father, Jim Curoso Sr., who was first introduced to plumbing in the Navy, and the family has now been caring for local customers for more than 40 years.

The company is fully licensed, bonded and insured (CSLB #706012) and specializes in water heaters of every type — gas, propane, electric, tankless, heat pump and commercial — alongside repiping, drain cleaning and a full range of residential and commercial plumbing repairs. Calls are returned quickly, a 24-hour answering service handles emergencies, and same-day water heater service is available.

services.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
services.description: Installation, repair and replacement of gas, propane, electric, tankless, heat pump and commercial water heaters, with same-day service available.

services.title: Tankless Water Heaters
services.description: Specialists in tankless water heater installation and service from brands like Rinnai and Navien.

services.title: Repiping
services.description: Whole-home and partial repiping to replace old, failing or leaking water lines.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Clearing slow and clogged drains to keep your home's plumbing flowing freely.

services.title: Plumbing Repair
services.description: Fast fixes for leaking pipes, running toilets, faucets and other everyday residential and commercial plumbing problems.

services.title: Gas Line Installation
services.description: Safe, code-compliant gas line installation for appliances and fixtures.

testimonials.quote: They were able to get the job done today (next day). Awesome customer service and great install by Shane.
testimonials.author: Pablo

testimonials.quote: Shane had been to my home previously and he did such a GOOD JOB!!! I give him and them 5 stars!!!
testimonials.author: Linda Ferreira

testimonials.quote: He's incredibly easy to work with, friendly, and clearly takes pride in doing the job right.
testimonials.author: Evan James

notes: Their own website (curosoplumbing.com) and Yelp/Facebook listings blocked direct fetching (403 / login wall). The only business-specific real images accessible on their site were a 'featured in Plumber Magazine' photo and a 'Voted Best Plumber in Sonoma County 2019' award badge; no usable truck/team/job-site photos could be confirmed. Yelp lists 53 photos and 278 reviews at 5 stars but the CDN photo URLs were not accessible. Other facts confirmed via BBB (established 9/20/1982, CSLB lic #706012 active to 8/31/2027, address 1925 Fulton Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95403) and web search.
